branchMissing.title: Item is not available in this branch
branchMissing.message: This item ({{entity}}) does not exist in the selected branch. Close this dialog to return back.

tips.t0: Character relationships are easy to explore on the project graph.
tips.t1: You can link notes to timeline events to keep chronology clear.
tips.t2: Factions help track groups, tensions, and political friction.
tips.t3: Dynasties are great for family trees and succession stories.
tips.t4: Use the map for locations, territories, and geographic context.
tips.t5: Tags speed up search and keep long-term campaigns organized.
tips.t6: Project branches let you try alternate storylines without losing canon.
tips.t7: Export is useful for backups and sharing a snapshot of your world.
tips.t8: The global search (Ctrl+K) jumps to entities across the project.
tips.t9: Dogmas pin fundamental world rules so the table stays consistent.
tips.t10: Wiki articles can be linked together to build a knowledge web.
tips.t11: Custom themes and appearance settings apply only on this device.
